default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in and review of brand identity design progress for Search.ai](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Giel and Nol presented updated brand guidelines, including content slide templates and logo concepts](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [Renato expressed enthusiasm for the second logo variant, emphasizing human-tech balance](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Team to incorporate non-directional feedback and finalize initial guidelines for Wednesday's presentation](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Project has used 2.5 days of work from both Giel and Nol; potential for additional projects this week](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)

## Topics

### Brand Guidelines Progress

  - [Content slide templates created with flexible layouts (two-column grid, lists, vital/paragraph combos)](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=143.0)
  - [Updated color schemes based on gradients](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Improved readability and adjusted website grid (12-column desktop, 6-column mobile)](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=241.0)
  - [Placeholder imagery added, noting need for refinement based on final logo/identity choice](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=284.0)
  - [Motion/interaction principles outlined (e.g., in-and-out easing, staggered animations)](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=317.0)

### Logo Concepts and Brand Identity

  - [Explored flower concept as per previous feedback](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=467.0)
  - [Developed new concept focusing on human-tech combination](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Three logo variations presented:](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
    1.  Conservative approach
    2.  Balanced human-tech representation (favored by Renato)
    3.  Digital-focused with handwritten elements
  - [Emphasis on creating a cohesive, explainable brand system (typography, imagery, shapes)](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=587.0)

### Next Steps for Finalization

  - [Renato to review content and ensure it's as final as possible](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Team to incorporate Sean's non-directional feedback (grids, website elements) into "safe" guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=988.0)
  - [Giel to update the original shared document with all current work](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Renato to present direction to Search.ai CEO and team on Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)

### Project Management

  - [Current time spent: 2.5 days each for Giel and Nol](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1016.0)
  - [Potential for additional projects opening this week; Renato to provide heads-up if needed](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Giel and Nol to incorporate Sean's feedback into guidelines before Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1096.0)
  - [Renato to review and finalize content in guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=847.0)
  - [Renato to present updated brand direction to Search.ai team on Wednesday](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=944.0)
  - [Team to await feedback post-Wednesday presentation for further refinement](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=927.0)
  - [Renato to inform of any additional projects opening this week](https://fathom.video/share/uc6iocuH-mGxhnf2jsy5cB-GgKaemKWN?tab=summary&timestamp=1048.0)

action_items.description: Review guidelines content. Ensure text alignment, finalize content where possible.
Present updated guidelines & logo concepts to Search team + CEO on Wednesday
Update first set of guidelines in original doc. Apply Sean's non-directional feedback (grids, website). Incorporate all current work.
